summary: End-to-end testing of YLRK Beschriftungen Vite+React site with FastAPI backend. All 10 backend pytest tests passed (root, chat DE/EN, chat-advanced, image generation, inquiries CRUD + validation). All 4 critical frontend flows verified in browser: homepage renders, language toggle DE/EN, Gemini chatbot returns relevant pricing answer, multi-step inquiry form submits and is persisted in MongoDB (verified via GET /api/inquiries), AI Design Studio image generation (~8s) and Designberater (~12s) both work.

issues: Large empty white space at the top above hero text on 1920x1080 viewport - hero content starts very low on the page; consider tightening top padding or reducing the hero min-height so the headline appears in the initial viewport without scrolling.

No data-testid attributes on any interactive elements; tests must rely on visible text/roles. Adding data-testid on chat button, inquiry form steps, AI studio tabs and generate button would harden automation.

action_items: (Optional polish) Reduce hero top padding so the H1 'IHR FAHRZEUG. IHR LOGO. MORGEN AUF DER STRASSE.' appears within the initial 1080px viewport.

(Optional) Add data-testid attributes to: chat sparkle toggle, chat input, chat send, inquiry type buttons, inquiry textarea, inquiry name/email/phone/company inputs, inquiry submit, AI studio tab buttons, prompt textarea, 'Design entwerfen' and 'Beratung anfordern' buttons.
(Nice-to-have) Backend /api/inquiries currently has no rate limiting or basic email format validation beyond Pydantic str; consider EmailStr.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: env vars read via os.environ[KEY] (fails fast) - good. MongoDB _id excluded in list_inquiries projection - good.
server.py: Uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in newer FastAPI; lifespan handler is preferred but functional.

InquiryForm.tsx handleSubmit always sets submitted=true even on fetch failure (success UI shown even if API errored). Consider differentiating error vs success states so users know if their data was actually received.

AIChatBot/AIDesignStudio call relative '/api/*' paths - works via ingress in this deploy but inconsistent with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL pattern used elsewhere in Emergent templates. Currently fine because Vite proxy / ingress handles it.
Image generation endpoint correctly handles RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED quota with friendly German message.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in app. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY present in /app/backend/.env.
seed_data_creation: Inquiry test records were inserted via POST /api/inquiries with name prefix TEST_E2E_<timestamp> and TEST_<timestamp>. These remain in the test_database.inquiries collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_ylrk_api.py -v` (uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL or defaults to preview URL). Image-gen test may skip gracefully on quota. UI selectors must be by visible text/role because no data-testid present. Inquiry form: click an exact type button (e.g. 'Fahrzeug' with exact=True) which auto-advances to step 2; then textarea+Weiter; then text/email inputs+submit. AI Studio tabs are 'Design Generator (Bild)' and 'Designberater & Karten'; image button is 'Design entwerfen', advisor button is 'Beratung anfordern'. Chatbot opens via the bottom-right sparkle button.
rca of the issue: None - no defects found. Two early selector failures during testing were due to test-script issues (lambda passed to get_by_role name in Python, and textarea.first matching AI Studio's textarea when not scoped to #offerte section). Resolved by scoping locators and using exact role names.
